title: Impossible Product Shots. Made in Masonry.
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~36s. Featured brand: Polene. Inspired by Tim Koda (DTZJRBxCAA5, an AI product-photography reel). Full editor brief: visual, Masonry generation, supers, edit, transitions, SFX.
concept: A capability-proof product-photography reel for Polene. The inspiration sells a three-step pipeline that turns one product into fifty impossible, photoshoot-grade shots: extract the brief into brand DNA, generate and iterate with inpainting and texture control, then polish to 4K so clients forget it is AI. The reframe makes Masonry that pipeline for a leather-goods brand: the Polene bag placed in impossible scenes, every texture controlled, photoshoot realism. Every frame is generated in Masonry following the Make in Masonry step, then cut to the beat.
audio: Polished, confident track with a premium pulse. Audio-only: no voiceover; the on-screen text carries the pipeline. Cut every super to the beat.
refsummary: The original (Tim Koda) sells an AI product-photography pipeline: others quote $15k and weeks for impossible shots, he delivers in ten minutes with three steps, extract the client brief into complete brand DNA, generate and iterate with inpainting and systematic texture control, then polish to 4K with micro-textures so clients forget it is AI, ending on fifty photoshoot-grade shots of a red leather handbag in surreal scenes. Watch it for the three-step product-photo pipeline; our version makes the engine Masonry.
story: A capability-led product-photography proof. Arc: HOOK, impossible product shots of the bag in surreal scenes. CONTRAST, others quote $15k and weeks. THE FIX, Masonry delivers in ten minutes. STEP 1, the brief becomes complete brand DNA. STEP 2, generate, iterate and inpaint, controlling every texture and detail. STEP 3, polish to 4K, realism that makes clients forget it is AI. RESULT, fifty impossible shots, no studio. CLOSE, Polene x Masonry. The viewer should leave believing Masonry can produce photoshoot-grade, impossible product imagery at scale.
takeaway: Masonry can turn one handbag into fifty impossible, photoshoot-grade product shots: brief to brand DNA, generate-iterate-inpaint with full texture control, then 4K polish, realism that makes clients forget it is AI, with no studio.
script_kind: On-screen text only. This is an audio-only reel: no voiceover, no spoken lines. Every line below is a super, shown exactly as written and cut to the beat of the track. Read top to bottom, this is the complete message of the video, word for word. Clean sans; emphasize the brand word Masonry in the accent color.

script.line: step 1: your brief becomes brand DNA
realism that makes clients forget it's AI

beats.super: Fades up over the surreal hero.
beats.visual: The Polene bag placed in a surreal, impossible scene, on a snowy peak. Hook.
beats.masonry: Upload the Polene bag to Masonry. Prompt 'red leather handbag on a snowy mountain ridge, surreal editorial, 9:16.' Generate the opener.
beats.edit: Slow push-in on the surreal hero.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 0 to 1: impossible shots of the bag in surreal scenes.

beats.visual: A quick contrast of an empty studio versus the finished impossible frame.
beats.masonry: Contrast beat: no studio or production team, just the Masonry generation.
beats.sfx: Low drone for the cost line.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 2 to 6: the cost-and-time contrast.

beats.visual: A fast montage hinting at the speed of generation.
beats.masonry: Show speed: several bag scenes generating quickly in Masonry.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 7 to 10: deliver in ten minutes.

beats.ost: step 1: your brief becomes brand DNA
beats.visual: A short screen-record extracting palette, lighting and mood from a brief.
beats.masonry: 0.6s screen-record: drop the brief into Masonry, it extracts palette, lighting, composition, brand DNA.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 11 to 15: brief extracted into brand DNA.

beats.visual: Base concept, then variations, then an inpaint refining a detail on the bag.
beats.masonry: Generate a base concept, iterate variations, inpaint specific details. Control every element in Masonry.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 16 to 20: generate, iterate, inpaint.

beats.visual: Macro cuts of leather grain, stitching and hardware, all controlled.
beats.masonry: Refine textures in Masonry: leather grain, stitching, hardware. Systematic control.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 21 to 24: refine textures and details.

beats.visual: The hero shot sharpening to crisp 4K, micro-textures resolved.
beats.masonry: Upscale to 4K in Masonry: micro-textures and lighting detail resolve.

beats.ost: realism that makes clients forget it's AI
beats.visual: A photoshoot-grade hero of the bag, indistinguishable from a real shoot.
beats.masonry: Hero generation: photoshoot-grade realism, the result that makes clients forget it is AI.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 29 to 31: realism that hides the AI.

beats.visual: A wall of fifty generated bag shots, every scene impossible, all on brand.
beats.masonry: Show the output wall: fifty on-brand bag shots generated in Masonry.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 32 to 34: fifty impossible shots.

beats.masonry: Close: the Polene x Masonry end card.
beats.edit: Clean cut to the end card.

notes: Editor workflow: load Polene's products into the Masonry library, then generate each beat with its Make in Masonry prompt and cut per the Super / Edit / Transition / SFX direction. Demo brand is a believable stand-in; swap in the real client when producing. All visuals are generated and assembled in Masonry. No media generated yet: generation is gated on separate approval per project policy.
